title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the morning of the Japanese Derby—held at
Tokyo Racecourse, it boasts a straight that's
525.9 meters long.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The wind's blowing in a good direction... There's
nothing to stand in my way...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan and Ines Fujin stand on opposite
sides of the track.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's so long... There's no way I can sprint that
whole distance...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Or maybe I can? I've done all I can in preparation
for this once-in-a-life chance, but was it enough?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Well... There's no way to really know until I go for
it! Okay...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm set! And I know Ryan will be right there with
me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm not good enough... 525 meters is just too
much...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ines is sure to win this as long as I don't have what
it takes to keep up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But even if it's impossible, even if I can't make it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I need to regain all my lost confidence!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If I really do have what it takes, then I'll definitely
keep up with her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stand beside Ryan as she stares at Ines's
silhouette in the distance. Their Derby is about to
begin.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I swear I'll take the lead!
